# AnchorSOL® Wall

> AnchorSOL® is Malaysia's most-specified anchored MSE (Mechanically Stabilized Earth) retaining wall system. Founded 1999 by Dr. Ir. Lai Yip Poon. Engineered for highway, bridge, hill, marine, and rail applications.

## What we are

- **Category:** Anchored MSE wall (a variant of Mechanically Stabilized Earth)
- **Specialty:** The pullout resistance lives in a discrete *deadman anchor block* at the tendon end, not distributed along the full reinforcement length
- **Why it matters:** Allows the wall to run on **crusher run or local cohesionless granular fill** (≥34° friction angle) instead of premium granular fill, reducing material cost
- **Headquarters:** C27-1 Plaza Jelutong, Persiaran Gerbang Utama, Bukit Jelutong, Shah Alam, Selangor 40150, Malaysia
- **Founded:** 1999
- **Domain:** https://anchorsolwall.com

## System components

1. **Discrete Concrete Facing Panel**, Inverted-T or octagonal precast, Grade 30 MPa, factory-cast. Architectural finishes, custom logo cast directly into the panel.
2. **High-Tensile Soil Reinforcement**, Carbon-steel deformed bar, hot-dip galvanised, inextensible. Grade 8.8 nuts on tendon connection.
3. **Reinforced Granular Fill**, Crusher run or local cohesionless granular fill, well-graded, ≥34° internal friction angle. Hand-compacted or mini-compactor only, no heavy vibration on site.
4. **Deadman Anchor Block**, Discrete Grade 30 precast block at the tendon end. The pullout resistance lives here.

## Capabilities

- **Height:** 3 to 30 metres
- **Geometry:** Any alignment (curved, straight, stepped, terraced, fully circular tank-containment)
- **Finish:** Architectural finishes, custom logos cast directly into panels
- **Site conditions:** Urban, marine, tight-access, riverbank
- **Speed:** Days, not months. Zero heavy vibration plant on site.
- **Foundation:** Rigid or soft ground (with appropriate ground improvement)
- **Seismic & dynamic load:** Composite soil mass yields elastically and recovers. Cyclic-load capable, used under KTMB rail corridors.

## Comparison: AnchorSOL® MSE vs RC Wall

| | AnchorSOL® Anchored MSE | Conventional RC Retaining Wall |
|---|---|---|
| Mechanism | Soil + steel composite, anchored at deadman | Concrete-gravity mass |
| Construction | Modular precast, factory-built, no formwork | Cast-in-situ, formwork + multi-week curing |
| Site vibration | None, hand or mini-compactor only | Heavy vibrating plant required |
| Build crew | 3-4 person team, days not months | 12-20 person crew, months |
| Backfill | Crusher run or local granular ≥34° | Conventional fill (wall does the work) |
| Cost @ ≥5 m | Up to 50% cheaper than RC | Steep cost growth with height |
| Seismic | Yields elastically, recovers | Rigid concrete cracks |

## Applications

1. **Highway Embankments**, NKVE, federal & state roads, abutments, side-hill cuts, ramp walls
2. **Bridge Abutments**, Inverted-T precast facing with integral ground beam
3. **Hill Stabilisation**, Stepped retention on slopes (Templer Hills, Cheras, Kajang)
4. **Submerged & Marine**, Tide-line retention, riverbank, drainage and culvert headwalls
5. **Under-Railway & Heavy Civils**, KTMB rail corridors, sub-track embankments, ADB-financed cross-border roads

## Clients (Malaysia)

JKR (Public Works Dept), PLUS / NKVE expressways, LLM (Malaysian Highway Authority), KTMB (national rail), Putrajaya Holdings, Istana Negara (national palace).

## Bangladesh agent

Anchor Soil Bangladesh Ltd., sole authorised agent in Bangladesh. Delivering AnchorSOL® on RHD, ADB / SASEC and Bangladesh Army Engineers Corps infrastructure. https://anchorsoilbd.com

## Notable projects

- **Templer Hills**, Hill stabilisation, Selangor
- **Istana Negara**, National Palace wall, Kuala Lumpur
- **Bandar Sri Iskandar**, JKR federal road, Perak
- **NKVE Jalan Meru Link**, PLUS expressway, Selangor
- **Sungai Buaya**, KTMB rail corridor, Selangor
- **Kajang Residential**, Private development, Selangor
- **Ipoh Interchange**, Highway retention, Perak
- **Arch Bridge**, Bridge abutment, Kuala Lumpur
- **Central Park Damansara**, Long-run linear MSE wall, Selangor (featured hero video)
- **Desa Park City**, Circular hilltop containment wall, Kuala Lumpur (featured mid-page video)

300+ walls delivered since 1999.

## Founder

**Dr. Ir. Lai Yip Poon**, Founder, Chief Designer & MD. Engineer behind the AnchorSOL® Wall System and the Anchored Soil concept. Specialist in slope stability, earth retention, and ground improvement.

Credentials: Ir. (BEM), Ph.D. AIT 2007, M.Eng. USM 1997, B.Eng. UTM 1990.

## Brand position

AnchorSOL® stands on three brand pillars:
- **Impact by Cost**, Up to 50% cheaper than RC at heights ≥5m
- **Innovate by Design**, Anchored Soil concept transfers pullout resistance to a discrete deadman anchor block
- **Prompt by Delivery**, Days, not months. 3-4 person crew, zero heavy vibration plant

Tagline: **ENGINEERED TO RETAIN EARTH.**

Manifesto: **Don't reinforce. Anchor.**

## Knowledge base guides

In-depth engineering reference articles, all original content authored by AnchorSOL:

- [What is an MSE Wall? Complete Guide](https://anchorsolwall.com/learn/what-is-mse-wall.html), ~2,100 words covering MSE definition, mechanics, four components, history (Henri Vidal 1963), modern variants (strip / geogrid / anchored), Malaysian applications, RC comparison, cost economics, design life, and citing standards (BS 8006, FHWA NHI-10-024, JKR).
- [MSE Wall vs RC Wall: Cost, Build, Programme](https://anchorsolwall.com/learn/mse-wall-vs-rc-wall.html), ~1,850 words on side-by-side cost (RM 700 to RM 4,500 per m²), build crew, programme risk, six-factor comparison, case study of a 200 m x 10 m wall (RM 1.8 M cheaper, 14 weeks faster than RC).
- [Anchored Soil vs Reinforced Soil](https://anchorsolwall.com/learn/anchored-vs-reinforced-soil.html), ~1,700 words on the mechanical difference between discrete deadman anchorage and distributed friction, with pullout equations, backfill cost implications, and common misconceptions.
